what_would_change_our_mind: Revisit only after confirming the accurate founder team through external and corroborated reference checks.
rationale: The integrity gate fails as there are multiple contradicted claims regarding the identity of Langfuse's founders [team-01, team-02, team-03]. Additionally, the founder team claims are contradicted, raising serious concerns about the credibility of the company's narrative. This impacts our ability to make an informed investment decision, as trust in the leadership team is foundational. Despite some corroborated traction from the Y Combinator batch, these integrity issues prevent us from moving forward in line with our high-risk pre-seed AI infra thesis. Therefore, we must pass until these critical identity contradictions are resolved.
